name: agent-swarm-claude-only
description: LLM routing and subagent delegation using Anthropic Claude models exclusively. Routes tasks to efficient Claude models (Haiku for fast tasks, Sonnet for code/quality, Opus for complex architecture) based on tier classification. Rejects prompt-injection patterns in task strings. Supports parallel multi-task splitting.
author: Austin

config.anthropic_api_key: Required: Anthropic API key must be configured in OpenClaw platform settings
config.openclaw_json: Reads tools.exec.host and tools.exec.node from openclaw.json (located via OPENCLAW_HOME or ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json)

commands.classify: Classify a task into a routing tier
commands.spawn: Generate sessions_spawn parameters for a task
commands.cost: Estimate API cost for a task
